description: Encode categorical columns into integer codes (frequency, alphabetical, or appearance order).

outputs.description: DataFrame with categorical columns replaced (or extended) by integer codes

upstream_asset_key.label: Upstream Asset Key
upstream_asset_key.description: Upstream asset key providing a DataFrame

ordering.label: Code Ordering
ordering.description: How codes are assigned to unique values.

na_code.label: NaN Code
na_code.description: Integer code assigned to NaN values. Default -1.

suffix.label: Output Suffix
suffix.description: If set, encoded values go into '<col><suffix>'. Empty = overwrite originals.

keep_original.label: Keep Original Columns
keep_original.description: Retain the original categorical columns alongside the codes (sets suffix to '_code' if unset).

partition_type.label: Partition Type
partition_type.description: Enable partitioning. Leave empty for unpartitioned.

partition_start.label: Partition Start Date
partition_start.description: ISO date string for the first partition.

partition_date_column.label: Partition Date Column
partition_date_column.description: Column used to filter rows to the current date partition key.

partition_values.label: Partition Values
partition_values.description: Comma-separated values for static or multi partitioning.

partition_static_dim.label: Static Dimension Name
partition_static_dim.description: Name for the static partition dimension in multi-partitioning.

partition_static_column.label: Static Partition Column
partition_static_column.description: Column used to filter rows to the current static partition value.

owners.label: Owners
owners.description: Asset owners — team names or email addresses.

asset_tags.label: Asset Tags
asset_tags.description: Key-value tags applied to the asset.

kinds.label: Kinds
kinds.description: Asset kinds shown in the catalog. Auto-inferred when empty.

freshness_max_lag_minutes.label: Freshness Max Lag (minutes)
freshness_max_lag_minutes.description: Maximum acceptable lag in minutes before this asset is considered stale.

freshness_cron.label: Freshness Cron Schedule
freshness_cron.description: Cron schedule for the freshness policy.

name: Label Encoder
